label: tool_envelope • invalid_args is the validation-error kind (retryable)
notes: The validation-error failure kind. Unlike tool_not_found / rejected / user_denied (terminal), invalid_args defaults to retryable=true: the arguments are malformed but the model can fix them and call again. Pins both the discriminator and that retryable default so a future change can't silently flip it.

toolEnvelope.message: Argument `count` must be a positive integer.
